TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Cipuwa = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Cipuwa. 279 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 759 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 16% niqan 122 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 84% niqan 637 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis14%, Bunun1%. Pusu nniqan alang Mniq saw mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida alang Cinfung o tmhangan dha "Kuncian ". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Cipuwa. Gasuc Gaga siyaw alang Cinfung. Tiri Breenux. Pgkla patas cyawtung ‚óŹMgrig su na rulu: Kndadax paru alang Skanki kksa muda elug Cunghwa dhuq Cian, qiri lutuc elug cungsanru 3 do kika qhuq. Klegan sjiqan nealang Amis. Snhiyan cungcyaw Joro, Teyeyncucyaw, Focyaw, Dawcyaw. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw ‚óŹSaan rmigaw: ŚźČťáéÁ•ěÁ§ĺťéģŚļßÁīÄŚŅĶÁĘĎ Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian elug 10 cyey Cipuwa. ‚óŹPusu pnhyugan: Kska sapah pyasan Cian 03-8523136 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Cipuwa elug cungsanru 3 662haw. ‚óŹPnyahan pnatas: Pgkla patas saan rmigaw
S.PHON: = ¶ipuwa = gaga mniq tajtuŇč ¶usaŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč ¶ipuwa. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč mniq saw mn…ĺmuxan tanańß tunux siida alaŇč ¶in*uŇč o tmńßaŇčan dńßa "kun ¶ian ". nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč ¶ipuwa. gasu ¶ gaga sijaw alaŇč ¶in*uŇč. ti…ĺi b…ĺ…ô…ônux. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč *mg…ĺig su na …ĺulu: kndadax pa…ĺu alaŇč skanki kksa muda …ôlug ¶uŇčńßwa dńßuq ¶ian, qi…ĺi lutu ¶ …ôlug ¶uŇčsan…ĺu * do kika qńßuq. kl…ôgan s…üiqan n…ôalaŇč amis. snńßijan ¶uŇč ¶jaw …üo…ĺo, t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw, *o ¶jaw, daw ¶jaw. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw *saan …ĺmigaw: ********* njusan skanki nsgan ¶ian …ôlug ** ¶j…ô ¶ipuwa. *pusu pnńßjugan: kska sapańß pjasan ¶ian **-******* njusan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč ¶ipuwa …ôlug ¶uŇčsan…ĺu * ***ńßaw. *pnjańßan pnatas: pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw
S.FORM: = Cipuwa = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Cipuwa. 279 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 759 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 16% niqan 122 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 84% niqan 637 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis14%, Bunun1%. Pusu nniqan alang Mniq saw mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida alang Cinfung o tmhangan dha "Kuncian ". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Cipuwa. Gasuc Gaga siyaw alang Cinfung. Tiri Breenux. Pgkla patas cyawtung ‚óŹMgrig su na rulu: Kndadax paru alang Skanki kksa muda elug Cunghwa dhuq Cian, qiri lutuc elug cungsanru 3 do kika qhuq. Klegan sjiqan nealang Amis. Snhiyan cungcyaw Joro, Teyeyncucyaw, Focyaw, Dawcyaw. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw ‚óŹSaan rmigaw: ŚźČťáéÁ•ěÁ§ĺťéģŚļßÁīÄŚŅĶÁĘĎ Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian elug 10 cyey Cipuwa. ‚óŹPusu pnhyugan: Kska sapah pyasan Cian 03-8523136 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Cian alang Cipuwa elug cungsanru 3 662haw. ‚óŹPnyahan pnatas: Pgkla patas saan rmigaw
S.PHON: = ¶ipuwa = gaga mniq tajtuŇč ¶usaŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč ¶ipuwa. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč mniq saw mn…ĺmuxan tanańß tunux siida alaŇč ¶in*uŇč o tmńßaŇčan dńßa "kun ¶ian ". nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč ¶ipuwa. gasu ¶ gaga sijaw alaŇč ¶in*uŇč. ti…ĺi b…ĺ…ô…ônux. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč *mg…ĺig su na …ĺulu: kndadax pa…ĺu alaŇč skanki kksa muda …ôlug ¶uŇčńßwa dńßuq ¶ian, qi…ĺi lutu ¶ …ôlug ¶uŇčsan…ĺu * do kika qńßuq. kl…ôgan s…üiqan n…ôalaŇč amis. snńßijan ¶uŇč ¶jaw …üo…ĺo, t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw, *o ¶jaw, daw ¶jaw. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw *saan …ĺmigaw: ********* njusan skanki nsgan ¶ian …ôlug ** ¶j…ô ¶ipuwa. *pusu pnńßjugan: kska sapańß pjasan ¶ian **-******* njusan skanki nsgan ¶ian alaŇč ¶ipuwa …ôlug ¶uŇčsan…ĺu * ***ńßaw. *pnjańßan pnatas: pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw
